name: python3-publicsuffix2
title: python3-publicsuffix2
summary: Python3 module to get a domain suffix using the Public Suffix List
description:
Python3 module to get a domain suffix using the Public Suffix List
This Python3 module allows you to get the public suffix of a domain name
using the Public Suffix List from http://publicsuffix.org.
.
A public suffix is one under which Internet users can directly register
names. Some examples of public suffixes are .com, .co.uk and pvt.k12.wy.us.
Accurately knowing the public suffix of a domain is useful when handling
web browser cookies, highlighting the most important part of a domain name
in a user interface or sorting URLs by web site.
.
This module replaces the deprecated python3-publicsuffix package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-publicsuffix2 because Python3 module to get a domain suffix using the Public Suffix List.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-publicsuffix2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-publicsuffix2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-publicsuffix2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
